name: BEN_DIAG_FF_ATCHMNT_G12_V
query: SELECT NAME "Object Name", 'Eligibiliy Profile' "Object Type", 'BEN_APLD_DPNT_CVG_ELIG_PRFL_F' "Table Name", 'APLD_DPNT_CVG_ELIG_RL' "Column Name", FFL.FORMULA_NAME "Formula Name", FFL.FORMULA_ID "Formula Id", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_NAME "Formula Type Name", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID "Formula Type Id", ADCEP.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE "Effective Start Date", ADCEP.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE "Effective End Date", FFL.ENTERPRISE_ID "Enterprise ID" FROM BEN_ELIGY_PRFL ELP , BEN_APLD_DPNT_CVG_ELIG_PRFL_F ADCEP , FF_FORMULAS_F FFL , FF_FORMULA_TYPES FFT WHERE ELP.ELIGY_PRFL_ID = ADCEP.DPNT_CVG_ELIGY_PRFL_ID AND ADCEP.APLD_DPNT_CVG_ELIG_RL=FFL.FORMULA_ID AND FFL.FORMULA_TYPE_ID=FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID UNION ALL SELECT NAME "Object Name", 'Eligy Prfl' "Object Type", 'BEN_ELIGY_PRFL' "Table Name", 'DPNT_CVG_ELIG_DET_RL' "Column Name", FFL.FORMULA_NAME "Formula Name", FFL.FORMULA_ID "Formula Id", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_NAME "Formula Type Name", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID "Formula Type Id", TO_DATE(NULL) "Effective Start Date", TO_DATE(NULL) "Effective End Date", FFL.ENTERPRISE_ID "Enterprise ID" FROM BEN_ELIGY_PRFL ELP, FF_FORMULAS_F FFL, FF_FORMULA_TYPES FFT WHERE ELP.DPNT_CVG_ELIG_DET_RL=FFL.FORMULA_ID AND FFL.FORMULA_TYPE_ID=FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID UNION ALL SELECT NAME "Object Name", 'Plan' "Object Type", 'BEN_ELIG_TO_PRTE_RSN_F' "Table Name", 'VRFY_FMLY_MMBR_RL' "Column Name", FFL.FORMULA_NAME "Formula Name", FFL.FORMULA_ID "Formula Id", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_NAME "Formula Type Name", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID "Formula Type Id", EPR.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE "Effective Start Date", EPR.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE "Effective End Date" , FFL.ENTERPRISE_ID "Enterprise ID" FROM BEN_PL_F PLN,BEN_ELIG_TO_PRTE_RSN_F EPR, FF_FORMULAS_F FFL, FF_FORMULA_TYPES FFT WHERE PLN.PL_ID=EPR.PL_ID AND EPR.VRFY_FMLY_MMBR_RL =FFL.FORMULA_ID AND FFL.FORMULA_TYPE_ID=FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID UNION ALL SELECT PLTY.NAME "Object Name", 'PlanType' "Object Type", 'BEN_ELIG_TO_PRTE_RSN_F' "Table Name", 'VRFY_FMLY_MMBR_RL' "Column Name", FFL.FORMULA_NAME "Formula Name", FFL.FORMULA_ID "Formula Id", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_NAME "Formula Type Name", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID "Formula Type Id", EPR.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE "Effective Start Date", EPR.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE "Effective End Date" , FFL.ENTERPRISE_ID "Enterprise ID" FROM BEN_PL_TYP_F PLTY,BEN_PTIP_F PTIP,BEN_ELIG_TO_PRTE_RSN_F EPR, FF_FORMULAS_F FFL, FF_FORMULA_TYPES FFT WHERE PLTY.PL_TYP_ID=PTIP.PL_TYP_ID AND PTIP.PL_TYP_ID=EPR.PTIP_ID AND EPR.VRFY_FMLY_MMBR_RL=FFL.FORMULA_ID AND FFL.FORMULA_TYPE_ID=FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID UNION ALL SELECT NAME "Object Name", 'Program' "Object Type", 'BEN_ELIG_TO_PRTE_RSN_F' "Table Name", 'VRFY_FMLY_MMBR_RL' "Column Name", FFL.FORMULA_NAME "Formula Name", FFL.FORMULA_ID "Formula Id", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_NAME "Formula Type Name", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID "Formula Type Id", EPR.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE "Effective Start Date", EPR.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE "Effective End Date" , FFL.ENTERPRISE_ID "Enterprise ID" FROM BEN_PGM_F PGM,BEN_ELIG_TO_PRTE_RSN_F EPR, FF_FORMULAS_F FFL, FF_FORMULA_TYPES FFT WHERE PGM.PGM_ID=EPR.PGM_ID AND EPR.VRFY_FMLY_MMBR_RL=FFL.FORMULA_ID AND FFL.FORMULA_TYPE_ID=FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID UNION ALL SELECT SUBSTR(PLN.NAME,1,40)||' :: '||SUBSTR(OPT.NAME,1,40) "Object Name", 'Plan :: Option' "Object Type", 'BEN_OIPL_F' "Table Name", 'VRFY_FMLY_MMBR_RL' "Column Name", FFL.FORMULA_NAME "Formula Name", FFL.FORMULA_ID "Formula Id", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_NAME "Formula Type Name", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID "Formula Type Id", OIPL.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE "Effective Start Date", OIPL.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE "Effective End Date", FFL.ENTERPRISE_ID "Enterprise ID" FROM BEN_PL_F PLN , BEN_OPT_F OPT , BEN_OIPL_F OIPL , FF_FORMULAS_F FFL , FF_FORMULA_TYPES FFT WHERE PLN.PL_ID = OIPL.PL_ID AND OPT.OPT_ID = OIPL.OPT_ID AND OIPL.VRFY_FMLY_MMBR_RL = FFL.FORMULA_ID AND FFL.FORMULA_TYPE_ID = FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID UNION ALL SELECT PGM.NAME "Object Name", 'Program' "Object Type", 'BEN_PGM_F' "Table Name", 'VRFY_FMLY_MMBR_RL' "Column Name", FFL.FORMULA_NAME "Formula Name", FFL.FORMULA_ID "Formula Id", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_NAME "Formula Type Name", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID "Formula Type Id", PGM.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE "Effective Start Date", PGM.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE "Effective End Date" , FFL.ENTERPRISE_ID "Enterprise ID" FROM BEN_PGM_F PGM , FF_FORMULAS_F FFL , FF_FORMULA_TYPES FFT WHERE PGM.VRFY_FMLY_MMBR_RL=FFL.FORMULA_ID AND FFL.FORMULA_TYPE_ID=FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID UNION ALL SELECT SUBSTR(PGM.NAME,1,40)||' :: '||SUBSTR(PLN.NAME,1,40) "Object Name", 'Program :: Plan' "Object Type", 'BEN_PLIP_F' "Table Name", 'VRFY_FMLY_MMBR_RL' "Column Name", FFL.FORMULA_NAME "Formula Name", FFL.FORMULA_ID "Formula Id", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_NAME "Formula Type Name", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID "Formula Type Id", PLIP.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE "Effective Start Date", PLIP.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE "Effective End Date" , FFL.ENTERPRISE_ID "Enterprise ID" FROM BEN_PGM_F PGM , BEN_PL_F PLN , BEN_PLIP_F PLIP , FF_FORMULAS_F FFL , FF_FORMULA_TYPES FFT Where PGM.PGM_ID=PLIP.PGM_ID AND PLN.PL_ID=PLIP.PL_ID AND PLIP.VRFY_FMLY_MMBR_RL=FFL.FORMULA_ID AND FFL.FORMULA_TYPE_ID=FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID UNION ALL SELECT PLN.NAME "Object Name", 'Plan' "Object Type", 'BEN_PL_F' "Table Name", 'VRFY_FMLY_MMBR_RL' "Column Name", FFL.FORMULA_NAME "Formula Name", FFL.FORMULA_ID "Formula Id", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_NAME "Formula Type Name", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID "Formula Type Id", PLN.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE "Effective Start Date", PLN.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE "Effective End Date" , FFL.ENTERPRISE_ID "Enterprise ID" FROM BEN_PL_F PLN , FF_FORMULAS_F FFL , FF_FORMULA_TYPES FFT WHERE PLN.VRFY_FMLY_MMBR_RL=FFL.FORMULA_ID AND FFL.FORMULA_TYPE_ID=FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID UNION ALL SELECT SUBSTR(PGM.NAME,1,40)||' :: '||SUBSTR(PLTY.NAME,1,40) "Object Name", 'Program :: PlanType' "Object Type", 'BEN_PTIP_F' "Table Name", 'VRFY_FMLY_MMBR_RL' "Column Name", FFL.FORMULA_NAME "Formula Name", FFL.FORMULA_ID "Formula Id", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_NAME "Formula Type Name", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID "Formula Type Id", PTIP.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE "Effective Start Date", PTIP.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE "Effective End Date" , FFL.ENTERPRISE_ID "Enterprise ID" FROM BEN_PGM_F PGM , BEN_PL_TYP_F PLTY , BEN_PTIP_F PTIP , FF_FORMULAS_F FFL , FF_FORMULA_TYPES FFT Where PGM.PGM_ID=PTIP.PGM_ID AND PLTY.PL_TYP_ID=PTIP.PL_TYP_ID AND PTIP.VRFY_FMLY_MMBR_RL=FFL.FORMULA_ID AND FFL.FORMULA_TYPE_ID=FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID
